title: Guestcam vs WhatsApp for Wedding Photos: Honest Comparison
description: WhatsApp compresses photos to 50% quality and the group turns chaotic. Guestcam keeps full quality in one private gallery.
author: Guestcam Team
tldr: WhatsApp compresses photos to 50% quality and the group turns chaotic. Guestcam keeps full quality in one private gallery.

content.text: What's wrong with WhatsApp wedding groups?
Almost every wedding has an 'Ana and Marko Wedding' group. After the day the chaos begins: 200 photos with no context, videos no one opens, and low-quality images that can't be printed.

content.alt: Smartphone with a messaging app on a wedding table
content.caption: WhatsApp compresses photos by up to 70%. Guestcam preserves full quality.

content.text: How do Guestcam and WhatsApp differ?

rows: Everyone in the group sees everything

content.alt: Group photo of wedding guests during the celebration
content.caption: One gallery, every guest, full resolution — instead of scattered group chats.

content.text: WhatsApp is great for a small family party of 10 where you know everyone's number. With 100+ guests it quickly becomes unmanageable.
Why do couples switch to Guestcam?

items: Full photo quality — print-ready for the wedding album.
No app for guests: they scan the QR code with the camera and upload.
One link / one gallery — no messages scattered across WhatsApp, Viber, Instagram.
Privacy: password-protect the gallery, no public posts.
One-click ZIP download after the event — no manual saving.

content.a: Yes. By default WhatsApp compresses photos to about 50% of original quality to save data. The 'Send as document' option bypasses compression, but few people know about it.

content.q: Can I combine WhatsApp and Guestcam?
content.a: Of course. Many couples use WhatsApp for pre-wedding chat with guests and Guestcam to collect photos during and after the day.

content.q: How do I stop guests from seeing other people's photos?
content.a: In a Guestcam gallery you can turn on moderation — photos appear only after you approve them. Or set a password and share it only with close friends.

content.q: Does Guestcam cost more than WhatsApp?
content.a: The free plan covers small events. For a full wedding we recommend Plus (€49) or Premium (€79) — less than the average wedding bouquet.

content.q: What happens to the WhatsApp group after the wedding?
content.a: It becomes a graveyard — messages get lost, photos disappear when someone clears their phone. A Guestcam gallery stays available for up to a year and can be downloaded permanently.
